claim_boundary: n=8 Phase 3 larger-system reduced-Pauli ZNE stress analysis only; not full tomography, backend-general entanglement dynamics, quantum advantage, or a full causal mechanism claim.

readout_mitigation.claim_boundary: full correlated readout inversion only; not a ZNE/PEC result and not a correction for basis-rotation or coherent gate errors
readout_mitigation.source: full computational-basis readout calibration from the same live artefact
